creator: aldis@bsdroot.lv
text:
The binary will be installed in /usr/local/bin

http://lxde.org/

Have fun!

===>  Building for lxsession-0.4.4

Fix: apply patch

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: cd to ports dir
make config
unselect NLS
make
